library.title: The 5-Second Hook Formula for Tutorials
library.summary: Open with outcome, then show risk of failure, then promise the roadmap. Works well for tutorial content.

library.title: Before/After Story Arc for Product Videos
library.summary: Before/after storytelling increases contrast with 3 turning points. Good for product transformation videos.

library.title: Emotional Tension + Fast Cuts for Vlog Growth
library.summary: Fast cuts and emotional spikes improve immersion. Place CTA 20 seconds after emotional peak.
